profiles.label: FarmShare 4x L40S free shards
profiles.role: free bulk sampling and queued Phase 0/Phase 1 continuation
profiles.notes: Use four independent one-GPU Slurm jobs; no tensor parallelism.

profiles.label: Mithril/Flow weekend 4x A100 80GB
profiles.role: weekend accelerator for Phase 1 catch-up and Phase 2 MCMC/GEPA/memory
profiles.notes: Submit as four single-GPU workers. Preferred 4x total price <= $0.10/hr so a 100h overrun still stays near the $10 cap. Check live Flow pricing before launch.

profiles.label: Modal burst/debug
profiles.role: Phase 3 mechanistic debugging and short vLLM/HF parity smokes
profiles.notes: Use only for bursty debug sessions; keep scale-to-zero discipline.

profiles.label: CloudRift RTX 4090 fallback
profiles.role: fallback if FarmShare and Flow block
profiles.notes: Use explicit launch-time UI rate in costs.json; V100 remains fallback only after FP16 smoke.
